progress_summary: v1.4 complete. All 8 PRs in the ADEV-328 → ADEV-337 chain merged (per Linear status=Done): PR 1 #192 (ADEV-328 pack registry architecture), PR 2 #203 (ADEV-329 backfill 5 packs), PR 3 #207 (ADEV-330 dispatcher + api-dev pack-read + kind:mobile), PR 4 (ADEV-334 modern web bulk — elixir/bun/deno + phoenix/remix/sveltekit/solid), PR 5 (ADEV-335 enterprise bulk — java/csharp/kotlin/php + spring/dotnet-aspnet/laravel), PR 6 #218 (ADEV-336 Apple/iOS — swift + swiftui + ios + app-store adapter), PR 6.5 #216 (ADEV-343 mobile bulk — kotlin-android + flutter + react-native-expo + play-store), PR 7 (ADEV-337 hosting adapters — railway/netlify/heroku/aws-amplify), PR 8 (ADEV-331 site surfaces + v1.4 release). Post-v1.4: PRs #213/#221/#223/#225/#231 shipped the navigation overhaul + /changelog roadmap timeline + Linear-connected feature-request form. PR #233 (email-pipeline) and follow-up #239 (Step-5 nested-form fix) shipped. 2026-05-31 PR-review wave cleared 11 PRs in one session: 2 feature (#239 email-pipeline fix, #243 link /coverage into nav), 2 security (#227 DOMPurify XSS-bypass, #209 js-yaml prototype-pollution), 7 dep hygiene (#241 vitest, #211 tailwind, #210 astro, #175 zod, #176 axe-core, #242 playwright, #173 wrangler 4.95 via Dependabot recreate). #208 closed as obsolete (superseded by v1.4 bulk pack PRs — main now has 26 coverage-flags + 13 api-dev-adapters vs. #208's 5/5). PR #232 (compare Option C feature redesign) held for user review — green and ready. Production is now ~12 PRs behind main; the deploy gap surfaced as the next blocker — hand-off to deploy-ops queued, with two security patches making it time-sensitive. 2026-06-21 RECONCILIATION: surfaced a hard PM↔code drift. Linear marked the whole v1.5 tree Done in a single batch at 2026-05-26T01:19:01Z (ADEV-344 parent + ADEV-346/347/349 children; ADEV-348 correctly Duplicate), BUT the four AI-native skills do NOT exist on origin/main or any branch — no skills/claude-api, skills/rag-forge, skills/agent-forge, skills/prompt-ops; no /ai-recipes, /blog, /for-agencies. The repo still carries exactly the 18 v1.4-era oc-* skills. v1.5 is therefore NOT built/merged/shipped — the tickets were closed without the deliverables landing. The ADEV-347/348 duplicate flagged in prior next_actions is already resolved (348 = Duplicate). What is actually in flight is the v1.4.3 Codex/MCP release (changelog Option C v2, deploy-decouple, Codex copy): merged to main (HEAD abfcafb) but UNDEPLOYED. Root cause (oc-bug-check, 2026-06-20): a Cloudflare Managed Challenge intercepts /api/health and POST /mcp before the Worker, so deploys land but the MCP endpoint serves a challenge page and the deploy-lag canary went silently blind. Action this session: reopened ADEV-344 chain, patched deploy-lag.yml to fail loudly on the challenge body, refreshed this + stack-forge checkpoints.

key_decisions: v1.4 theme: coverage-as-a-plugin-registry. skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + reference docs replace hardcoded stack tables.
Apple/iOS ships in v1.4.0 (PR 6) — pressure-tests the kind: mobile dispatch branch. Android/Flutter/RN deferred to v1.5 once release-ops handles Play Store + EAS.

Distribution model: bundle-everything in opchain-skills.zip. Per-pack flags (skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled) filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded — keeps regulated/air-gapped installs intact.
5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). Other ~13 skills stay at 1.2.0.
8-PR sequencing: PRs 1-3 serial (architecture → backfill → dispatcher), PRs 4-7 parallelizable, PR 8 last (release).
ADEV-333 was created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332.

LHCI a11y failures on #187 (TOC touch size, code-block contrast, band labels, changelog links) are pre-existing — unrelated to the JSON-only diff. Standing up as ADEV-338 family on a separate branch off main, NOT BLOCKING v1.4.

user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when the PR sequence is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.
Approves merges promptly once CI is green; deploys are always manual.
Skips non-actionable bot replies on PRs (no noise back to LHCI bot).

next_actions: UNBLOCK DEPLOY (user-only, Cloudflare dashboard): add a WAF Skip rule (Managed Challenge + Super Bot Fight Mode) for `http.host eq "opchain.dev" and (starts_with(http.request.uri.path,"/api/") or http.request.uri.path eq "/mcp")`, repeat for staging.opchain.dev. Then redeploy v1.4.3 from main (HEAD abfcafb) and verify `curl -sS https://opchain.dev/api/health` returns JSON version + `curl -sS -X POST https://opchain.dev/mcp -d '{...tools/list...}'` returns JSON-RPC. Production is ~12+ PRs behind and two security patches (DOMPurify XSS, js-yaml prototype pollution) make it time-sensitive.

v1.5 is NOT actually built despite Linear closure — kick off Sprint 1 for real: scaffold skills/{claude-api,rag-forge,agent-forge,prompt-ops} with final frontmatter + stub bodies, flag-registry entries, and Astro content schema per roadmap/08-v15-sprint-plan.md § Sprint 1. ADEV-344 chain reopened 2026-06-21.
Pre-flight before email-pipeline flag flips on: verify opchain.dev sending domain in Resend dashboard → `wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY` on both staging and prod envs.
User decision on PR #232 (feat(compare): switch to Option C). Branch up-to-date with main, CI green — approve squash-merge or close.

Schedule code-auditor pre-deploy sweep before v1.5 Sprint 2-3 land — agent-forge + claude-api + rag-forge introduce prompt-injection / tool-use surfaces that code-auditor needs new rules for. Also a hygiene pass on the v1.4 dispatcher refactor (ADEV-330) — entire v1.4 cycle shipped without a sweep.

reconciliation_2026_05_15.trigger: GitHub's auto-merge of origin/main into the PR branch (commit 1a3293a, authored by asfbay-bit) overlapped with the prior reconcile in commit 2c1f381. The auto-merge took both versions of three conflict regions (header, progress_table, next_actions) without adding the inter-section commas that JSON requires; checkpoint:validate failed on the resulting file at line 40 col 5, breaking the Worker CI step.
reconciliation_2026_05_15.fix: Hand-rewrote orchestrator.checkpoint.json to consolidate the two branches' content into a single valid document: kept theirs' v1.4-shipped / v1.5-planning narrative, appended the email-pipeline thread, deduplicated progress_table rows, and put the PR #233 watch action at the top of next_actions.

pr_wave_2026_05_31.trigger: User invoked /orchestrator asking which PRs needed review and which were ready to merge. Surfaced 13 open PRs (4 feature, 9 Dependabot) — actioned all in one session.
notable_actions: Resolved 3 site/package-lock.json conflict cascades by re-updating branches in dependency order after each merge.
Triggered `@dependabot rebase` on #173 and #176 after first-pass conflicts; #173 also required `@dependabot recreate` (which bumped wrangler 4.90→4.95 latest).
Verified #209 (js-yaml major v3→v4) safe to merge by grepping all 5 callsites — all use only `yaml.load(string)` which is behavior-compatible across the major.
Closed #208 rather than rebasing because the underlying stale-baseline bug it fixed no longer exists on main (v1.4 PRs landed correct baselines).
